title: IncidentReport
description: Canonical shape consumed by Container 1 (Problem Report) for a robotic lawn-mower fleet. Every trigger source — onboard vision, mower telemetry, a fixed sensor, or a field-operator handheld portal — normalizes its input to this shape before entering the BPMN. The Fleet AI Analyst agent, IRB Action Center HITL, and downstream containers all read this object.

incidentId.description: Stable identifier assigned by the trigger adapter. Format: `IR-{YYYYMMDD}-{seq}` recommended.

type.description: Trigger source category. Determines which adapter normalized the input. `vision`=onboard camera/AI, `sensor`=onboard IMU/lidar/bump, `telemetry`=fleet platform event, `manual`=field-operator handheld portal.

detectorConfidence.description: When applicable (vision, automated detectors), the source's confidence score. Used by the Risk Agent's Fast Track gateway. Omit or set to 1.0 for manual/deterministic sources.

occurredAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the underlying event occurred (not when the trigger fired the BPMN).

severity.description: Initial severity tag from the trigger source. The Risk Agent may revise this in Container 3.

subject.description: Short human-readable headline (e.g., `BLADE_JAM: foreign object in cutting deck, unit MOW-07`).

description.description: Free-form details supplied by the source. May include error codes, observed measurements (tilt angle, GPS drift), comparison to spec, attached evidence URIs.

affectedItems.description: Fleet units / parts implicated by the incident. Drives supplier & parts impact analysis in Container 4.

itemId.description: Mower unit id, part number, or module id.

supplierId.description: Optional supplier identifier; populated when a part is sourced externally.

quantity.description: Affected quantity or count of units in the affected batch.

safetyZone.description: Operating zone of the mower when the incident occurred. Safety-critical zones (near-road, near-water, public-access, steep-slope) bias the Risk Agent toward Full Track / human review (a mower misbehaving here can hurt someone or be lost).

evidence.description: Supporting evidence URIs (onboard captures, telemetry logs, operator photos).

uri.description: Cloud storage or content-addressable URI to the evidence artifact.

reportedBy.description: Human or system that filed the incident (the `Requestor` role in the framework).

principalId.description: User ID, service account name, or detector instance ID.

tags.description: Free-form tags used by the Analyst agent for clustering related incidents.

vendor.description: Trigger-source-specific raw payload, preserved verbatim for audit. Adapters MUST NOT mutate; downstream agents may consult.
